meta.title: Nemo — Offshore sailing game
meta.description: Online offshore sailing game. Real polars, NOAA weather, zero pay-to-win.

login.lede: Nemo is an online offshore racing circuit. Real polars, real weather, and a boat that follows you from race to race, shaped by your wins.

1.title: Real polars
1.body: The same files for every player, from Figaro III to Ultim.

2.title: NOAA GFS weather
2.body: Updated every 6 h, identical on the engine and router sides.

3.title: Your boat, your career
3.body: You keep your boat from one race to the next. Each podium earns credits that fund your upgrades: sails, foils, electronics.

4.title: Prepare your race
4.body: Before every start, you decide: sail wardrobe, foil setup, supplies. Your choices shape the result.

login.colophon: A skipper's career, mile after mile.

form.title: Sign in
form.sub: Sign in with your email and password.
form.legalPost: . Account data is hosted in Europe.

public.noTagline: This skipper hasn't set a public tagline yet.

classRanking.title: Palmares per fleet
classRanking.empty: This skipper has not yet completed a ranked race.

social.title: Social
social.sub: Follow other skippers, join a team, manage your invitations.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: Manage your public identity, account, gameplay preferences and notifications.

identity.title: Public identity
identity.aside: This information is visible to other skippers in rankings, race history and on your profile page.
identity.pseudoHint: Between 3 and 24 characters. Letters, digits, dashes and underscores.
identity.teamHint: Team creation, invitation and management happen on the Social page.
identity.taglinePlaceholder: A catchphrase visible on your profile page.
identity.taglineHint: 120 characters max. Leave empty to hide the section on your profile.

account.title: Account
account.aside: Email used for sign-in and password.
account.emailHint: A confirmation link is sent on every change.

preferences.title: Gameplay preferences
preferences.aside: Units, display format and interface language.
preferences.speedDesc: Used on the HUD, compass and polars.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.aside: Email channel. In-app notifications stay active during a race.
notifications.startDesc: Reminder one hour before the start of a race you're entered in.
notifications.gateDesc: Email each time you cross a mandatory gate.
notifications.podiumDesc: A skipper you follow finishes in the top 3 of a race.
notifications.newRacesDesc: Announcement of new race dates in classes you own.
notifications.weeklyDesc: Email every Monday with your results and circuit news.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.aside: Irreversible actions. Read carefully before acting.
danger.logoutAllDesc: Ends every active session (web, mobile). You'll have to sign in again everywhere.
danger.exportDesc: ZIP archive with your race history, fleet and settings. GDPR.
danger.deleteDesc: Permanent deletion of your skipper, fleet and history. No way back.

notFound.metaDescription: This page doesn't appear on any of our charts.
notFound.ledeLine1: This page doesn't appear on any of our charts.
notFound.ledeLine2: No known coast at this position.

tooltips.bspBase: Actual boat speed — maneuver penalties included
tooltips.factor: Overlap zone — auto-sail only, keeps the active sail when another would be marginally faster (≤ +1.4%) and applies the optimal BSP to avoid bouncing.

penalty.sail: Sail change in progress — speed reduced

wear.label: ⚓ Wear
wear.explain: A worn boat sails slower. Avoid extreme conditions to preserve performance.

tooltips.lockedOn: TWA locked — heading follows the wind

sailPanel.lockoutBanner: You have a sail change scheduled in a few minutes. You cannot change sail manually without removing your scheduled order.

confirmReplaceProg.title: Replace schedule
confirmReplaceProg.bodyMain: You have {n, plural, one {<bold>#</bold> pending order} other {<bold>#</bold> pending orders}}. Applying the route will replace all future orders and enable auto sail.

results.head: ✓ Route computed
results.warning: ⚠ Incomplete route: weather limited to D+7

progBanner.title: {n, plural, one {# OBSOLETE ORDER} other {# OBSOLETE ORDERS}}
progBanner.desc: {n, plural, one {Trigger time already past. Will be removed automatically.} other {Trigger time already past. Will be removed automatically.}}

progQueue.multiTabNote: The last confirmation wins. Avoid scheduling from several tabs at once.

common.twaLockSub: Heading relative to wind · follows shifts

wp.pickStart: Click on the map to place
wp.minDistance: Min distance from boat: {n} NM (safety radius).
wp.dragHint: Drag the marker on the map to move.

sail.alreadyAuto: Boat is already in auto sail at this time
sail.warnAutoNoOp: ⚠ Boat is already in auto sail at this time. The order would be a no-op.
sail.warnTransition: ⚠ A previous sail transition isn't finished by this time.
sail.noWpAvail: NO WAYPOINT AVAILABLE — ALL ALREADY REFERENCED

progPanel.deleteWpRef: This WP is referenced by a sail order. Both will be deleted.
progPanel.clearAllBody: This empties the schedule being edited. You can revert with «Cancel».

identity.title: Name
identity.boatNameHint: 20 characters max. Visible on the deck, palmares and ranking.

zones.appendagesAside: Color applied to all underwater parts.

mainsail.title: Mainsail
mainsail.numberHint: 6 characters max. Visible from far away — prefer number or initials.

jib.title: Jib / Genoa
jib.textHint: 12 characters max. Optional — leave empty for a clean sail.

hull.title: Hull
hull.textHint: 20 characters max. The boat name is used by default.

lede.seriesMid: — only performances achieved with a strictly stock boat.
lede.allPre: Cumulative rank across all season races, all classes combined.

teams.lede: Cumulative team ranking, aggregated across all members' results, all classes combined.

races.title: Races
races.empty: No race matches — remove a filter.

marina.title: Marina
marina.heroLede: Your personal fleet. Each boat follows you from race to race, gains performance with your upgrades and carries your colors.
marina.errorBannerHelpEnd: ) and that the game-engine is running.
marina.emptyBanner: No boat yet. Enter a race to receive your first hull.
marina.lockedTextPost: race to receive your blank hull.

boatDetail.loadingErrorHelpEnd: ) and that the game-engine is running.

perfSection.title: Performance vs series
perfSection.aside: Cumulative effects of installed upgrades compared to a series boat.

autoRepair.text: Your boat is automatically restored at the start of every race. Wear accumulated at sea is wiped at arrival — focus on strategy, not maintenance.

equipmentSection.title: Equipment
equipmentSection.asideLocked: Seven slots to configure. Edits blocked during the race.
equipmentSection.asideOpen: Seven slots to configure. Click «Change» to modify a slot.

historySection.title: History
historySection.asideCount: {n, plural, one {# completed race} other {# completed races}} with this boat.
historySection.asideEmpty: No race completed with this boat.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.heroLede: Your upgrades in stock. Uninstalled items can be resold for credits. Installed items must be removed from a boat before being resold.

available.title: Available
available.aside: Resell an item to recover 70% of the price paid. Admin purchases not refunded.

installed.title: Installed
installed.aside: Items currently mounted on your boats. Remove from the marina to resell.
installed.empty: No upgrade installed on your boats.

confirmSell.title: Sell this upgrade?
confirmSell.bodyEnd: of the price paid. Irreversible action.

slotDrawer.title: Change — {slot}
slotDrawer.badgeOwned: {n, plural, one {# in inventory} other {# in inventory}}

tooltips.addToInventory: Add a copy to your inventory

confirm.bodyEndInstall: — the item will be installed immediately on this boat.
confirm.bodyEndStock: — the item will go to your inventory.

meta.title: Legal notice · Nemo
meta.description: Publisher, host and legal information for the Nemo service.

pageLegal.title: Legal notice
pageLegal.intro: Who publishes this service, who hosts it, who to contact. Nothing hidden, all on the same page — in compliance with French law on confidence in the digital economy.

lines: 38 Avenue John F. Kennedy, L-1855 Luxembourg
101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA
Points of presence: Paris, Frankfurt, London

ip.p1: The general structure, texts, graphics, sounds, videos and animations making up the site are the exclusive property of the publisher or its partners, and are protected by intellectual property laws in force.
ip.p2: Any reproduction, representation or exploitation, in whole or in part, of the contents and services of the site, by any means whatsoever, without prior written authorization from the publisher, is prohibited and would constitute infringement sanctioned by the Intellectual Property Code.
ip.p3: The boat polars used in the game engine are either public data certified by the boatbuilders, or acquired under commercial license from them. Weather data comes from the NOAA GFS model, distributed free of charge by the American agency NOAA.

marques.p1: «Nemo», the logo, and the names of the game modes are trademarks registered by the publisher. Boat brands and manufacturers (Figaro, Class40, IMOCA, Ultim, Ocean Fifty) belong to their respective owners and are used under license or for informational purposes.

responsabilite.p1: The information and content distributed on the site are provided for information purposes. The publisher strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of information but cannot guarantee its completeness.
responsabilite.p2: The publisher disclaims any responsibility for the interpretation that may be made of the information present on the site, and the consequences of its use.

contact.intro: For any question, request or report related to the service:

meta.title: Terms · Nemo
meta.description: Terms of service for the Nemo circuit.

pageCgu.title: Terms of service
pageCgu.intro: The rules of the game, from sign-up to termination. Written to be readable, not to hide behind legal jargon.

objet.p1: These terms of service (hereinafter «Terms») govern access to and use of the Nemo service, an online offshore racing game accessible at nemo.sail and via the associated mobile app.
objet.p2: The service is published by the publishing company identified in the <legal>legal notice</legal>. Use of the service implies full acceptance of these Terms.

acceptation.p1: Acceptance of the Terms is materialized by creating a player account. It applies for the entire duration of use of the service.
acceptation.p2: The publisher may modify these Terms at any time. New conditions apply from publication on the site. In case of substantial change (pricing, personal data, game rules), active users are notified by email with 30 days notice.

compte.p1: Creating an account requires providing a valid email address and choosing a unique username. The player guarantees the accuracy of the information provided and undertakes to keep it up to date in their profile.
compte.p2: The account is strictly personal and non-transferable. Sharing credentials, reselling, or creating multiple accounts are forbidden and constitute grounds for immediate suspension.
compte.p3: The publisher reserves the right to refuse or modify a username containing hateful, racist, sexist, defamatory remarks, or impersonating a third party.

regles.intro: The service is a simulated regatta competition. All players use the same real boat polars, the same NOAA GFS weather and the same calculation engine. No paid advantage is accessible in the game: credits used for boat upgrades cannot be purchased with money and are earned solely through racing results.
forbidden: Use of bots, scripts, or unauthorized automation modules
Exploitation of known bugs, request injection, or any technical bypass
Collusion between accounts to skew a ranking
Toxic behavior, harassment or discriminatory remarks in chats and teams
regles.sanctions: Sanctions range from warning to permanent suspension, including invalidation of results and revocation of fraudulently obtained credits.

abonnement.intro: All races on the circuit are accessible to every player, regardless of their tier. The Free / Career difference is about the gameplay around the race, not access to the races themselves.
tiers: Free. One-shot races, season ranking, real-time broadcast every 120 s. No marina access, no season progression.
Monthly or annual subscription. Full marina (boat upgrades, hull and sail customization), real-time broadcast every 30 s, routing tools (isochrones), persistent career progression for the season.
abonnement.billing: The subscription is charged by Stripe. It can be cancelled at any time from the account page; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. No prorated refund is given for an already-started period, except as provided by law (14-day right of withdrawal for a first subscription).

ip.p1: All elements of the service (code, graphics, texts, trademarks, computed polars, derived weather model) are the exclusive property of the publisher or its partners and are protected by copyright and trademark law.
ip.p2: The player retains ownership of boat names, mottos and customization elements they enter, but grants the publisher a non-exclusive license to display them as part of the service (ranking, replays, social sharing).

responsabilite.p1: The publisher undertakes to keep the service accessible under reasonable conditions. Interruptions for maintenance, technical incidents, or force majeure (operator failure, network outage, cyberattack) may occur without engaging the publisher's liability.
responsabilite.p2: The publisher cannot be held responsible for losses of credits, positions or statistics resulting from force majeure or a security intervention. Reasonable compensation may be granted on a case-by-case basis.

resiliation.p1: The player can delete their account at any time from the Settings page. Deletion is immediate and irreversible: username, fleet, history and credits are deleted within 30 days. Data necessary for legal and accounting obligations is kept for the duration provided by law.
resiliation.p2: The publisher may unilaterally terminate an account in case of serious breach of the Terms, with 15 days notice except in case of proven fraud or attack on the security of the service.

loi.p1: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution falls, failing amicable resolution, under the competent courts of the publisher's registered office, subject to mandatory legal provisions in favor of consumers.
loi.p2: A mediation procedure is accessible via the <ext>consumer mediation platform</ext> for any dispute that has not been amicably resolved with customer service.

meta.title: Privacy · Nemo
meta.description: Nemo privacy policy and personal data handling.

pagePrivacy.title: Privacy policy
pagePrivacy.intro: What we collect, why, how long we keep it, and how you can retrieve or delete everything. Your email will never be sold.

responsable.p1: The data controller for personal data is the publishing company identified in the <legal>legal notice</legal>.
responsable.p2: For any question regarding the processing of your data or the exercise of your rights, you can contact our data protection officer: <mail>dpo@nemo.sail</mail>.

donnees.intro: Nemo collects only the data strictly necessary for the operation of the service:
items: Email, hashed password (bcrypt), username, registration date
Race history, simulated GPS positions, results, fleet boats and upgrades, credits earned
Friendships, team membership, sent and received invitations
IP address, user-agent, screen resolution, timezone — for fraud detection and responsive adaptation
Stripe customer ID only. Card numbers never transit through our servers

destinataires.intro: Your data is never sold. It is accessible only to the publisher's technical teams and the following processors, strictly bound by GDPR-compliant contracts:
items: Hosting of game servers and databases, region eu-west-3 (Paris)
Anonymous collection of application errors for debug
destinataires.outro: All these processors host or process data within the European Union. No transfer outside the EU is carried out without your explicit consent.

droits.intro: In accordance with GDPR and French data protection law, you have the following rights:
items: Obtain a copy of your processed data
Correct inaccurate data from the Settings page, or on request
Delete your account and your data (Delete my account button in Settings)
Receive your data in a structured format (ZIP JSON archive) via the «Request export» button
Object to processing based on legitimate interest
Temporarily freeze processing in case of dispute
droits.exercise: To exercise these rights: <mail>dpo@nemo.sail</mail>. We respond within one month.
droits.complaint: You can also lodge a complaint with the <ext>CNIL</ext> if you believe the processing of your data violates GDPR.

securite.intro: We implement the following technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
measures: Principle of least privilege for internal access
securite.breach: In case of a data breach likely to create a risk to your rights and freedoms, we inform the CNIL within 72 hours and communicate with the affected persons as soon as possible.

mineurs.p1: The service is accessible to minors aged 13 and over. For players under 15, parental consent is required at registration, in accordance with French law.
mineurs.p2: No data is used for targeted advertising profiling on minor players.

meta.title: Cookies · Nemo
meta.description: Cookie and tracker usage policy on Nemo.

pageCookies.title: Cookie policy
pageCookies.intro: Only those needed to sign you in. No advertising tracking, no hidden pixel, no third-party agency.

definition.p1: A cookie is a small text file stored by your browser when you visit a website. It allows the site to recognize you on subsequent visits, remember your preferences and sometimes analyze your usage.
definition.p2: Nemo uses only strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service. We do not use any advertising cookies, no third-party tracking cookies, and we do not sell any data to advertising agencies.

rows: Stores the chosen display language (French, English, Spanish, German)
1 year, renewed at each language change
liste.p1: This cookie is strictly necessary for the operation of the service. In accordance with French legislation, it does not require prior consent.
liste.p2: This list will be updated as features arrive (anti-CSRF token for sensitive actions, display preference storage, Cloudflare anti-bot protection). Any evolution will be announced according to the procedure described in article 05.

items: No advertising cookie (Google Ads, Meta Pixel, etc.)
No third-party tracker for marketing purposes
No sharing of behavioral data with agencies
No invisible pixel in transactional emails
pasDeTracking.outro: Internal analytics (session time, race completion rate) are aggregated server-side without cookie or persistent identifier associated with your account.

gestion.intro: You can at any time delete or block cookies via your browser settings. Warning: blocking strictly necessary cookies prevents account login and renders the service unusable.

evolution.p1: If Nemo were to introduce an analytics cookie subject to consent (for example to measure the performance of a new mode), an explicit consent banner would be deployed, in accordance with CNIL recommendations. No non-necessary cookie will be deposited without your clear and prior consent.
evolution.p2: Changes to this policy will be communicated by email to active users and signaled at the top of this page with 15 days notice.

news.indexLede: Race announcements, balance adjustments, skipper interviews, game updates. Maintained by the Nemo editorial team.

hero.lede: Nemo is an online offshore racing circuit. Real polars from boatbuilders, GFS weather updated every 6 h, and a boat that follows you from race to race, shaped by your wins.

pillars.title: Meet Nemo.
pillars.lede: Three pillars that make Nemo a skipper's circuit: faithful simulation, shared data for all, progression earned race after race.

polars.title: Real polars
polars.body: The same files for every player, from Figaro III to Ultim. Provided by boatbuilders, never modified. Your boat behaves exactly like in real life.

weather.title: Real weather
weather.body: GFS data updated every 6 h, identical on the game engine and third-party router sides. Your tactical decisions are taken on the same files as a skipper in a real race.

career.title: Your boat, your career
career.body: A single hull that follows you from race to race. Your podiums fund your upgrades — sails, foils, electronics. Your progression is the only currency that counts.

liveRaces.title: It's happening now.
liveRaces.empty: No live race right now — check the open races.

career.body1: Career mode is the long version of Nemo. You start with a recent boat but no equipment — Figaro, Class40, IMOCA or Ultim depending on the race that launches you. Each race you finish leaves a mark: a podium, credits, an upgrade.
career.emphasis: Your boat ages with you, gains color, gains performance.
career.body2: Credits are earned in races and fund your upgrades — sails, foils, electronics. Career mode gives you persistence of your boat, season-long progression, and the official circuit palmares.
